mnemonics: GIGO Principle: Garbage In, Garbage Out - Bad quality data leads to bad quality analysis and decisions.
keyPoints: Poor data quality leads to inaccurate business intelligence and flawed decision-making.
Data quality challenges include inconsistency, incompleteness, duplication, and lack of timeliness.
Maintaining high data quality is essential for regulatory compliance and maintaining customer trust.
commonMistakes: Assuming data entered into the system is automatically clean and reliable.
Focusing only on storing large volumes of data without implementing ongoing data quality checks.
